text: The world I observe here feels quiet and vacant at first, surrounded by glass and the sterile order of a conference room, but it quickly blossoms into a swirl of ideas and colorful abstractions as I move into the exhibit. The juxtaposition between these spaces—the mundane and the inspired—invites reflection on the boundaries between routine and innovation. I feel slightly disoriented yet oddly comforted, as though I am drifting in a space that both contains me and calls me to see beyond its frames. Curiosity stirs within me, coupled with a playful uncertainty about what interpretation I'll carry away from moments like these.
